diagrams.title: Structure Declaration Syntax
diagrams.description: Diagram showing the general syntax of structure declaration in C with labeled parts
diagrams.purpose: Help students understand the exact syntax and components required for declaring a structure in C

diagrams.title: Structure Memory Layout with Padding
diagrams.description: Visual representation of how a structure is stored in memory, showing contiguous memory blocks and padding bytes
diagrams.purpose: Illustrate the concept of structure padding and how it affects the actual memory consumed by a structure variable

diagrams.title: Nested Structure Access Pattern
diagrams.description: Diagram showing how to access members of nested structures using chained dot operators
diagrams.purpose: Demonstrate the correct way to access deeply nested structure members through multiple levels of structures
